final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing WeChat article cover image for a fragrance new-product launch campaign named "染秋".

Style/medium: needs a high-end, premium-quality aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be center composition with the title as the dominant focal element
Subject: must include the "染秋" fragrance new-product launch as the central theme
Scene/backdrop: needs an autumnal atmosphere — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a refined, luxurious mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm autumnal direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a premium surface treatment — exact material and texture choices are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" (large, primary, centered)
Constraints: must be formatted at 900×500 horizontal aspect ratio; title must be visually prominent
Avoid:
